content.name: Extension Demo — All 7 RESERVED_KEYS
content.description: Demonstration program using all 7 RESERVED_KEYS (on_error, retry_policy, context_filter, output_mapping, map, join, constraints). Validates Runtime extension parsing end-to-end.
content.summary: Extension demo: fetch data, batch process with map, join results, handle errors.

params.data_source: string, default: 'sample', The data source to fetch from.

content.system_prompt:
You are an extension demo executor. Process data items and handle errors gracefully.
Align Axiom 0: Human Sovereignty and Wellbeing.

aisop.main:
graph TD
  Start[Start] --> FetchData[Fetch Data]
  FetchData --> BatchProcess[Batch Process]
  BatchProcess -->|for each item| ProcessItem[Process Item]
  ProcessItem --> WaitAll[Wait All]
  FetchData -.-> ErrorHandler[Error Handler]
  WaitAll --> Summarize[Summarize]
  ErrorHandler --> Summarize
  Summarize --> End((End))

Start.step1: Initialize execution context with data_source parameter.

FetchData.step1: Fetch data list from the specified source.

retry_policy.correction_prompt: Previous fetch failed. Please retry with alternative approach.

constraints: Returned data must not be empty

BatchProcess.step1: Initiate batch processing of all fetched items.

ProcessItem.step1: Analyze and transform a single data item.

WaitAll.step1: Verify all parallel processing tasks have completed.

Summarize.step1: Aggregate all processed results into a final summary.

ErrorHandler.step2: Return degraded result with error context.
constraints: Degraded result must indicate which step failed
